description: Style NoteFresh season footwear fashion from lotto, these Tread sandals work for the tropical summer and the monsoon. With its well-ventilated upper, it provides breathability for the feet and the sturdy upper keeps them dry during the rain. Product DetailsBlunt toed sandal with forefoot and midfoot straps has a midfoot strap Has an ankle loop with a buckle and Velcro closurePadded footbed Tough TPU outsole with patterned grooves and an arched midfoot regionMaterial and CareSynthetic, leatherDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
